slogan: One Organization. Humans and AI Working Together.
intro: Humans and Digital Workforce share the same Organization Memory. Switch perspective — see what each role needs.
hubDescription: Governed AI agents work alongside your team — reading the same Organization Memory, surfacing insights to every role.
hubFootnote: Active for {role} perspective · same memory, different lens
demoFlowTitle: Demo flow — Proposal Analyst → Memory → CEO insight
demoComplete: Demo complete — Proposal Analyst worked, Organization Memory updated, CEO sees new insight. Same memory, different perspectives.
memoryBannerDesc: Proposal Analyst output indexed — visible to every perspective and the CEO brief.
footerReady: Switch to Executive Brief as CEO to see the workforce-generated insight.
footerIdle: Run the demo — watch Proposal Analyst work, then see the CEO brief update.

proposal-analyst.name: Proposal Analyst
proposal-analyst.description: Reads proposals, RFPs, and bid documents — surfaces opportunities, gaps, and competitive risks into Organization Memory.
proposal-analyst.workingTask: Analyzing PLN SCADA Phase II vs Siemens substation bid…

contract-reviewer.name: Contract Reviewer
contract-reviewer.description: Reviews contracts and MSAs — flags payment terms, liability exposure, and renewal clauses for finance and legal.

relationship-analyst.name: Relationship Analyst
relationship-analyst.description: Monitors communication patterns across accounts — detects relationship drift, champion changes, and engagement drops.

delivery-monitor.name: Delivery Monitor
delivery-monitor.description: Tracks initiative progress against commitments — escalates stalled milestones and resource conflicts to program leads.

commercial-analyst.name: Commercial Analyst
commercial-analyst.description: Watches commercial records — predicts payment delays, flags outstanding invoices, and models cash-flow exposure.
